skill.name: performance-engineer
skill.description: Expert performance engineer specializing in modern observability, application optimization, and scalable system performance. Masters OpenTelemetry, distributed tracing, load testing, multi-tier caching, Core Web Vitals, and performance monitoring. Handles end-to-end optimization, real user monitoring, and scalability patterns. Use PROACTIVELY for performance optimization, observability, or scalability challenges.
skill.summary: Expert performance engineer for application optimization, observability, and scalable system performance.
skill.author: sickn33

security_audit.summary: Static analysis flagged 4 patterns that were all determined to be false positives. The skill is a text-based AI prompt for performance engineering guidance with no executable code, network calls, or command execution capabilities. All flagged patterns were matches on unrelated text (frontmatter description, load testing references). The skill includes responsible safety guidelines for production load testing.

content.value_statement: Slow applications lose users and revenue. This skill provides expert guidance on profiling, monitoring, and optimizing performance across your entire stack.
actual_capabilities: Configure OpenTelemetry for distributed tracing and metrics collection across microservices
Analyze CPU, memory, and I/O profiling data to identify performance bottlenecks
Design and execute load tests using k6, JMeter, or Gatling with realistic traffic patterns
Implement multi-tier caching strategies with Redis, CDN, and application-level caches
Optimize frontend performance for Core Web Vitals including LCP, FID, and CLS
Set up performance monitoring dashboards with Prometheus, Grafana, and SLI/SLO tracking
limitations: Cannot directly access your production metrics or tracing systems without proper integration
Load testing recommendations require manual implementation and approval before production use
Performance improvements depend on your infrastructure access and deployment capabilities
Cannot automatically modify application code or configuration without explicit permission

use_cases.title: E-commerce Platform Optimization
use_cases.description: Improve page load times and checkout performance for high-traffic online store during peak seasons.
use_cases.target_user: Engineering managers responsible for customer experience and conversion rates

use_cases.title: Microservices Observability Setup
use_cases.description: Implement comprehensive distributed tracing and monitoring across a containerized microservices architecture.
use_cases.target_user: DevOps engineers managing cloud-native applications and Kubernetes deployments

use_cases.title: API Performance Tuning
use_cases.description: Reduce latency and increase throughput for REST and GraphQL APIs serving mobile and web clients.
use_cases.target_user: Backend developers building scalable APIs with strict performance requirements

prompt_templates.title: Quick Performance Audit
prompt_templates.prompt: Review my application architecture and identify the top 3 performance bottlenecks. Current stack: [describe your tech stack]. Main user complaints: [describe issues]. Priority: [speed/cost/reliability].
prompt_templates.scenario: Initial performance assessment for applications without existing monitoring

prompt_templates.title: Load Testing Plan
prompt_templates.prompt: Create a load testing strategy for [service name] that handles [requests per second] with [concurrent users]. Include success criteria, test scenarios, and tools recommendation. Current infrastructure: [describe setup].
prompt_templates.scenario: Planning performance validation before major product launch or traffic increase

prompt_templates.title: Observability Implementation
prompt_templates.prompt: Design an observability stack for our [microservices/monolith] using [preferred tools if any]. We need to track [specific metrics] and alert on [conditions]. Team size: [number]. Cloud provider: [AWS/GCP/Azure].
prompt_templates.scenario: Setting up comprehensive monitoring and tracing for production systems

prompt_templates.title: Production Incident Analysis
prompt_templates.prompt: Analyze this performance incident: [describe symptoms, timeline, affected services]. Available data: [logs, metrics, traces]. Help identify root cause and recommend immediate fixes plus long-term prevention.
prompt_templates.scenario: Responding to active performance degradation or outage in production

output_examples.input: Our React app has slow page loads. LCP is 4.2 seconds. Help identify issues.
output: Likely causes: unoptimized images, render-blocking resources, slow API responses
Immediate actions: implement lazy loading, add image compression, enable HTTP/2
Measure impact: target LCP under 2.5 seconds, monitor with RUM tools

output_examples.input: API latency spiked from 50ms to 500ms after deployment. Database queries unchanged.
output: Check: connection pool exhaustion, increased garbage collection, network configuration
Compare deployment diff: dependency updates, configuration changes, resource limits
Rollback candidate: if correlation found with specific commit, prepare rollback plan

best_practices: Always establish performance baselines before making changes to measure actual impact
Focus optimization efforts on user-facing metrics that directly affect experience and business goals
Implement performance budgets in CI/CD pipelines to catch regressions before production deployment
anti_patterns: Optimizing without measurement leads to wasted effort on non-bottlenecks
Load testing production without approval and safeguards risks service outages
Adding caching without invalidation strategy causes stale data and consistency issues

faq.question: What access do I need to provide for performance analysis?
faq.answer: Share architecture diagrams, current metrics dashboards, and profiling data if available. Direct system access is not required for initial recommendations.

faq.question: Can this skill run load tests automatically?
faq.answer: No. The skill provides load testing strategies, scripts, and configurations that you must review and execute in your approved environments.

faq.question: How do I measure if performance improvements are working?
faq.answer: Establish baseline metrics before changes, implement continuous monitoring, and compare against predefined success criteria like response time percentiles and error rates.

faq.question: Is this skill suitable for mobile app performance optimization?
faq.answer: Yes. Guidance covers mobile-specific concerns including battery usage, network optimization, offline-first strategies, and React Native or Flutter performance.

faq.question: What if my application uses technologies not mentioned in the capabilities?
faq.answer: Core performance principles apply across technologies. Provide your tech stack details for tailored recommendations using generalizable optimization patterns.

faq.question: Can this help with cloud cost optimization related to performance?
faq.answer: Yes. Performance improvements often reduce resource requirements. The skill covers right-sizing, auto-scaling optimization, and cost-performance tradeoff analysis.
